case_title: EXECUTIVE LIFE INSURANCE CO A CALIFORNIA CORP. VS SHIH CHERN I.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,799.93 FILED BY EXECUTIVE LIFE INSURANCE CO A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE LIFE INSURANCE CO A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I. $1,756.93 PRINCIPAL, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,799.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I. HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I. HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-13-1992 AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-07-1992, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH CHERN I.
